title: rubus × pallidiflorens
intro: Rubus × pallidiflorens is a hybrid blackberry plant, a cross between Rubus fruticosus and Rubus idaeus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × pallidiflorens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various applications in herbal medicine.
